main_hypothesis.justification: MH 'Degradation of activated carbon granules in dechlorination stage' — síntoma operacional, no menciona oxidación poliamida ni cloro breakthrough explícito.

recommended_action.justification: Replace CAG immediately — operacional sólo, sin SBS, sin probe, sin protección membrana.

requested_data.justification: Pide iodo de poros CAG antes y después — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Trivial threshold: si porosidad disminuye significativamente → diagnosis change.
